title: kneiffia riparia
side_effects: Kneiffia riparia can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems in some individuals. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to dizziness, nausea, and headaches. In severe cases, improper use of Kneiffia riparia can result in kidney damage, liver toxicity, and even seizures. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant extracts, as improper use can have serious consequences.
